title: City Park Cleanup
description: Join us for a morning of cleaning up Lake Eola Park. We'll be picking up litter, clearing invasive plants, and restoring walking trails. Gloves and bags provided.

title: After-School Tutoring Program
description: Help elementary and middle school students with reading, math, and science. No teaching experience required — just patience and enthusiasm!

title: Food Bank Sorting Shift
description: Sort and pack donated food items for distribution to families in need across the Tampa Bay area. Comfortable shoes and closed-toe footwear required.

title: Virtual Resume Workshop
description: Help job seekers improve their resumes in a virtual group workshop. Volunteers will review resumes, give feedback, and offer career advice. Great for HR professionals or anyone with hiring experience.

title: Animal Shelter Dog Walking
description: Give shelter dogs some exercise and socialization! Volunteers walk dogs, spend time with cats, and help with basic care. Training provided on-site.

title: Community Garden Planting Day
description: Help plant vegetables and herbs in a community garden that supplies fresh produce to local food pantries. All skill levels welcome — bring sunscreen!

title: Senior Center Tech Help
description: Assist senior citizens with using smartphones, tablets, and computers. Help them connect with family, access services, and stay safe online. Patience is the most important skill!

title: Mental Health Awareness 5K
description: Volunteer to help organize and run a 5K walk/run fundraiser raising awareness for mental health. Roles include registration, route marshaling, and water stations.

title: Online Literacy Tutoring
description: Tutor adult learners one-on-one to improve reading and writing skills via video call. Sessions are 1 hour. Training and materials provided.

title: Coastal Beach Cleanup
description: Join hundreds of volunteers to remove trash and debris from Miami Beach's coastline. Equipment provided. Family-friendly event — kids welcome with a guardian.

title: Homeless Shelter Meal Service
description: Help prepare and serve hot meals to residents at a local homeless shelter. Volunteers are needed for cooking, serving, and cleanup. No experience necessary.

title: Youth Basketball Coaching
description: Coach and mentor kids aged 8–14 in basketball fundamentals. Help build teamwork, discipline, and confidence. Background check required — contact us in advance.

title: Mangrove Restoration Project
description: Plant mangrove seedlings along Fort Lauderdale's waterways to restore natural habitats and protect against coastal erosion. Boots and sun protection recommended.

title: Virtual Mental Health Support Chat
description: Trained volunteers provide text-based emotional support to people in crisis. This session is for onboarded volunteers only. Mandatory 30-hour training required before first shift.

title: Library Reading Buddies
description: Read aloud with children ages 4–8 at the local library to build early literacy skills and a love of reading. Sessions are 2 hours every Saturday.

title: Cat Foster Orientation
description: Attend an orientation session to become a certified foster caregiver for cats and kittens. Learn about care routines, medical needs, and how to prepare your home.

title: Neighborhood Mural Painting
description: Help paint a community mural in the Wynwood neighborhood. No artistic experience needed — all paint and supplies provided. Come ready to have fun!

title: Virtual Financial Literacy Workshop
description: Volunteer to teach budgeting, saving, and basic financial planning skills to low-income adults via Zoom. Curriculum provided. Financial background preferred.

title: Blood Drive Support
description: Support a community blood drive by greeting donors, managing sign-ins, handing out refreshments, and providing encouragement. A great way to save lives without donating yourself.

title: Hurricane Preparedness Fair
description: Help educate the community on hurricane preparedness at a public fair. Volunteers staff information booths, distribute emergency kits, and guide visitors through preparedness activities.
